What's Inside (Completed 05/07/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 1 of 2
Ry Schwartz: Hey guys. Welcome back to 10X Launches. Now, before we really dive in to the
bulk of the course, I want to give you a very, very quick overview of what's
inside, and how we're going to approach this whole thing.
So, the program is actually really split into two main parts, and part one is going
to be very much foundational. It's really the answer to the question, who do I
write copy? How do I write copy for these launches, these funnels, these
courses, these programs? How do I write copy? So it's really going to be about
the approach. It's going to be the foundational shift of how you actually write
messages that generate those, "OMG you totally get me" moments. That earned
trust and generate sales with your audience.
More importantly, it's going to be about how to do that quickly and reliably.
Even if you're a copywriter and having to do this for audiences that you literally
just met, it's going to be a methodical system for doing that.
And yeah, it is going to be a bit of a process and require a bit of a paradigm shift.
We are going to change the game in how you approach writing for your funnels,
and this isn't going to be just a motivational braindum. These are actually the
practical mindsets and applications that really lay the foundation for your new
"career" as a conversion coach.
So, I invite you to steep in them, watch them twice if you have to. The content is
really going to be new, but it will be what empowers you to make writing copy
your favorite part about launching courses and especially writing for your
funnels.
So whereas Module 1 will be mostly conceptual and theory about the coaching
the conversion method, Module 2, the ever-evolving avatar is where you'll
actually get a really big picture at what's at play here. If the whole process of
coaching the conversion is about taking our customer on this journey and really
coaching that transformation, we're going to really have to know who they are
and respect them as this growing, three-dimensional, every-evolving thing, this
entity, this avatar, so this is going to be the module where we really breathe life
into them. You're going to get a taste of the 47 golden questions of work
[inaudible 00:02:41] which is actually going to be our reference manual for
everything coming later in the course. These are really going to be the questions
that drive the content. They're really going to be the things that get us to view
our avatar in a new, very real way. In a way that will allow us to build rapid trust
and intimacy. So that's what's going to be in store with Module 2.
Following that, we're going to get into the second part of the course which is
going to be Modules 3 through 7 where we're actually going to take a much
deeper dive into the five core subsequences of every launch. So regardless of
what kind of funnel or methodology or system you are using, you will inevitably
be leveraging and really using these five different phases. And each one has very
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

What's Inside (Completed 05/07/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 2 of 2
specific beats that you're going to have to be hitting if you're going to want to
coach the conversion.
So, we're going to talk about all of these individually. We're going to talk about
what function they play in the overall conversion and how you, as a conversion
coach, need to approach them in order to really make sure they're doing their
job.
And then finally, for each module, for each subsequence, you are going to be
introduced to something I call themeplates. You're going to get a library. There's
going to be about 20 to 25 of them within the course. We're going to be
updating these throughout, but these are things I've initially created for myself
to know what my go-to themeplates would be in each scenario.
Okay, I need to coach decisiveness, for example, Here is a themeplate that I can
use to effectively do that. So you're going to be introduced to themeplates in
each module that are appropriate for that particular subsequence. Why I call
them themeplates and not templates is because there really is no such thing as
swipe and deploy. There is no one size fits all things, so while these themeplates
really do give a great compass and indication, even a structure to follow to
really get these emails done, I really do want to give that disclaimer right off the
bat, and I'm going to remind you throughout that there is no such thing as one
size fits all. Really, these are designed not because they are worded in any kind
of particular brilliant way, but the structuring of them, the layering of them, and
what content, what messages you're able to kind of really use these
themeplates for as a container for is really going to be why they get the results.
So, that's a word on themeplates. That is really it. That is really the core of the
course. We have our foundational elements. We're going to do a deeper dive
into all the phases of your launch, and for each one, you are going to get the
themeplates so that you can really just plug them in and know what to write at
what time, and that's what takes out most of the anxiety around writing high-
converting email copies.
So that's what is in store. I will meet you in one final lesson within the welcome
module where I'm going to talk about a few different ways to approach this
course to really maximize your ROI, so take a little break and meet me there in a
minute.
